title: Defensive Positioning for U12
description: A guide to teaching defensive stance and footwork for under-12 players. Covers help defence, on-ball defence, and communication on court.

title: Full Court Press Defence — U14
description: Step-by-step breakdown of the full-court press, including trap positions, rotations, and how to coach players to execute under pressure.

title: Zone Defence Fundamentals — U16+
description: Introduction to 2-3 and 1-3-1 zone defences. Includes diagrams, rotation rules, and drills to develop zone awareness in older players.

title: Dribble Drive Offence Overview — U14
description: Introduction to the dribble-drive motion offence for U14 and above. Covers spacing, reads, and progressive drills to build the system.

title: Transition Offence Principles — U16+
description: How to coach fast-break and secondary transition offence. Includes lane-filling, outlet pass timing, and decision-making drills.

title: Ball-Handling Drills — U8 Beginners
description: A series of ball-handling drills for players just starting out. Easy to run at training with minimal equipment. Covers stationary, moving, and partner drills.

title: Shooting Progression Drills — U14
description: Progressive shooting drills from form shooting to off-the-dribble. Designed to build muscle memory and game-realistic shooting habits.

title: Footwork Fundamentals — All Ages
description: Core footwork drills covering pivoting, jump stops, and jab steps. Suitable for all age groups and skill levels as a warm-up or focused session.

title: Press Break Game Plan — U16+
description: Structured game plan for breaking full-court and half-court pressure. Includes entry options, safety outlets, and decision-making guidelines.

title: Court Time Calculator
description: Generate an even court time rotation for 7–9 players across 2 × 20 minute halves. Keeps exactly 5 players on court at all times.

title: Set Play Playbook — End of Quarter
description: A collection of set plays for end-of-quarter and end-of-game situations. Includes diagrams and coaching notes for U14 and above.

title: Player Development Framework — U16+
description: Basketball Victoria's recommended player development pathway for teenage athletes. Covers physical, technical, tactical, and mental development pillars.

title: Introduction to Basketball Movement — U8
description: Fun, game-based activities to introduce movement patterns and court awareness to the youngest players. Keeps sessions energetic and skill-focused.

title: Passing Drills for U10
description: Age-appropriate passing drills designed to develop chest pass, bounce pass, and overhead pass technique in U10 players.

title: Half-Court Offence Introduction — U10
description: Simple half-court offensive concepts for U10 teams. Covers spacing, passing priorities, and how to create open looks without complex systems.
